repositories.description: Comma-separated list of GitHub repos whose `renv.lock` files it will restore, e.g. `myUsername/repo1,myUsername/repo2`. By default, uses the `renv.lock` file at the root of the repository. Can specify branch (e.g., `myUsername/repo1@branch`), `renv` profile (e.g., `myUsername/repo1:renvProfile`) or both (e.g., `myUsername/repo1@branch:renvProfile`)

pkg.description: Comma-separated list of specific packages to cache explicitly.

pkgExclude.description: Comma-separated list of packages to exclude from the renv snapshot restore process.

restore.description: Whether to run package restoration using renvvv::renvvv_restore(). Default is true.

update.description: Whether to run package update using renvvv::renvvv_update(). If both restore and update are true, renvvv::renvvv_restore_and_update() is used. Default is false.

createUnifiedLockfile.description: Whether to create a single unified `renv.lock` file combining dependencies. 'auto' creates it only if multiple lockfiles or explicit packages are provided. 'true' always creates it. 'false' skips creation.

purgePostUnification.description: Determines which package versions to keep when purging the global cache to save disk space (if a unified lockfile is created). 'none' disables purging. 'keep-one' retains the update-based lockfile packages if `update` is true and the restore-based lockfile otherwise. 'keep-both' retains both. If no unified lockfile is create, this option is ignored.

setRLibPaths.description: Whether to set default paths for R libraries (including for `renv`) to avoid needing to reinstall upon codespace rebuild.

overrideTokensAtInstall.description: If true, temporarily override GITHUB_TOKEN and set GITHUB_PAT from the best available token (priority: GITHUB_PAT > GH_TOKEN > GITHUB_TOKEN) during the renv package install phase. Tokens are reset to their original values after install completes. Disable if you want to manage tokens manually.

lockfileDir.description: Path to the directory containing subdirectories with `renv.lock` files. Defaults to `/usr/local/share/renv-cache/lockfiles`.

usePak.description: Whether to use `pak` for package installation. For some reason, restoring from the `renv` cache has not worked when using `pak` to build the image, so this is not recommended.

debugRenv.description: Whether to use verbose renv output. Sets `RENV_CONFIG_INSTALL_VERBOSE` and `RENV_VERBOSE` to true when enabled.

installSystemRequirements.description: Uses the Posit API to install apt-dependencies.
